commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Waters. The captives shall be refreshed in the deserts, chap. xxxv. 6., and xliii. 20. (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: God is not offering his services as a water manager or a farmer when he says, “I will open rivers in a dry land; I will plant in the wilderness the cedar and the box tree.” - "Against Marcion 3.5"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
